steps.title: Read the data sentence
steps.content: The previous sentence says the Douglas DC-10 is far more aerodynamic than the Wright Flyer. The sentence after the blank gives a precise lift-to-drag comparison that supports that claim.

steps.title: Select the detail transition
steps.content: Choice A introduces a specific supporting detail. Choice B would signal a conclusion, but the sentence gives evidence. Choice C and Choice D signal contrast, yet the ratio supports rather than contradicts the previous sentence. The answer is A.
